meta.description: Daily strategy-relevant fact set per liquid US optionable name (the scanner's data layer).
meta.provenance: Facts 1-7 and 9 (typical IV, realized vol, IV-RV gap, IV rank, drawdown, largest down day, spread, option volume) are computed from ALPACA data (BS-implied IV; split-only-adjusted equity history; option quotes/bars). Market cap (fact 8) is from FINNHUB (/stock/profile2 company market cap); ETFs show N/A because funds have no company market cap (a category distinction, not missing data).
meta.typical_iv: Median of the BS-implied ATM-put IV over the trailing 252 sessions (r=0/European/no-div BS inversion; a consistent proxy, not vendor 'true' IV). Coverage in iv_coverage_n.
meta.iv_rank: Where current IV sits within its trailing-252 min/max range (0-1); null when coverage < 2.
meta.realized_vol: Annualized stdev of 21-trading-day-horizon daily log returns (split-adjusted), median over trailing 252 — matched to the IV horizon.
meta.drawdown: Max peak-to-trough on split-adjusted closes over 1/3/5yr, with recovery_days (back to prior peak) or underwater_pct (still below). All windows pre-computed.
meta.spread_pct: Current ATM-put bid/ask spread from the INDICATIVE feed — modeled and time-sensitive; NOT a reliable point-in-time liquidity read. Lead with option_volume; treat a wide spread as indicative only.
meta.option_volume: Trailing ~10-session average daily volume of the shared ~35-DTE ATM-put contract (the genuine liquidity-depth signal). option_volume_days = sessions the average covers; a low count (e.g. 1) is a single noisy day.
meta.market_cap: Finnhub company market cap (USD) + band (Mega>=$200B / Large / Mid / Small / Micro). ETFs: N/A (funds have no company market cap).
meta.name: Company name (Finnhub) or fund descriptive name (e.g. SPY -> 'S&P 500') — for name-search alongside the ticker. Not a quote.
meta.disclaimer: Educational/informational only. NOT investment advice. May contain gaps or errors.
